g.text: 2. Unmarried Dependant Children Details (Maximum of six nominations per application)
3. Extended Family Details (Maximum of four nominations)
ID Number or Date of Birth
ID Number or Date of Birth
Please debit my account on the following day of each month

I, the undersigned, hereby authorise the Accounting Officer of the Department of ............................................ to deduct a premium of R ........................ from my salary on a monthly
basis and remit it to Martin’s Funerals from which I have obtained an insurance policy, until such time as I cancel this authorisation in writing or until I substitute it with a new authorisation.
Should the relevant premium be adjusted by Martin’s Funerals as a result of a general contractual increase/decrease in the premium, or should I request Martin’s Funerals to increase/de-
crease the premium for certain reasons, I hereby grant permission that the adjusted premium may be deducted from my salary until such time as I cancel this authorisation in writing
or substitute it with a new authorisation.
By my Signature I agree to pay
Martin’s Funerals is a Registered Financial, Services Provider
I, the undersigned, hereby declare and warrant that any and all information supplied herein, is true and complete. I am aware, and understand, any non-disclosure or misrepresentation of
information that is material to the determination of the risk by African Unity Life may lead to the policy being declared null and void, in which case all premiums/fees paid will be forfeited. I
hereby authorise Martin’s Funerals or its authorised representative to draw against my account, the premium payable under the above plan from time to time, and I request my bank to debit
my account in terms of this order. This request will remain in force until cancelled by me in writing. I hereby irrevocably authorise Martin’s Funerals or its authorised representative to obtain
at any time verifications of my account details from my bank. I confirm that the “RULES, TERMS AND CONDITIONS” stated on the reverse side of this page have been explained to me, I
understand them and I accept them as part of this agreement. I acknowledge and consent that Martin’s Funerals or its authorised representative can collect my premiums and may contact
me with any changes to my funeral policy or benefits.
Underwritten by African Unity Life Limited an Authorised Financial Services
Riesling House, The Vineyards Office Estate,
